title: Automating workflows and file organization with Antigravity
summary: Google Antigravity is a tool for automating file system workflows and organizing repositories across multiple projects. It enables users to automate tasks based on time boxes and tags to improve software development efficiency.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates Antigravity, a tool for automating file system workflows and organizing repositories across multiple projects. It covers how tasks can be automated based on time boxes and tags. The stated goal is improved software development efficiency through workflow automation and file handling.
